findings.title: Public administrative port exposed
findings.description: SSH is open to 0.0.0.0/0 on a production-facing security group.
findings.impact: The management plane is reachable from the internet.
findings.remediation: Restrict administrative access to a VPN, bastion, or approved ranges.

findings.title: Pipeline token has broad write permissions
findings.description: The workflow grants write permissions broadly instead of per job.
findings.impact: A compromised step can modify code, releases, or artifacts.

findings.title: Container runs without a non-root user
findings.remediation: Create a dedicated user and switch to it before runtime.

findings.title: Missing readiness probe
findings.remediation: Add a readinessProbe checking a health endpoint.
